ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
OR( PRIORVALUE(Name) ="Summary - Former Employees Company Accounts", PRIORVALUE(Name) ="Summary - Alumni Internal Accounts", PRIORVALUE(Name) ="Summary - Deceased", PRIORVALUE(Name) ="Summary - Private Contacts" ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can not change Summary Accounts. For questions get in touch with André Ryf. (ACM002)
